Drivers and headers for ICE40LP and FPGA display control on the Snowy platform.


## Files
- **[ice40lp.c](ice40lp.c.md)**: Driver for configuring and controlling the ICE40LP display using SPI communication on a specific platform.
- **[ice40lp.h](ice40lp.h.md)**: Header file for controlling an ICE40LP display, defining GPIO constants and display control functions.
- **[snowy_boot_fpga.c](snowy_boot_fpga.c.md)**: Controls and manages the initialization, configuration, and operation of the FPGA display for the Snowy platform.
